title: New AI coding paradiagm - OpenAI Symphony
summary: OpenAI Symphony is a new AI coding framework or paradigm that enables developers to structure codebase workflows with auto-testing and harness setup capabilities. The tool includes workflow configuration through a WORKFLOW.md file and integration with related services like Crewlet and Superdesign.
